name: Bubbly Slime Submerge
outcome: While [AttackerName] slowly and seductively rubs her slick and soft body against [TargetName], especially her large gooey tits, she slowly pulls [TargetHimOrHer] deeper into the fizzing pool of slime, covering more and more of [TargetHisOrHer] body in goo.
miss: While [AttackerName] slowly and seductively rubs her slick and soft body against [TargetName], especially her large gooey tits, she slowly pulls [TargetHimOrHer] deeper into the fizzing pool of slime, but [TargetHeOrShe] struggles too much and keeps from going deeper!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s body is left wanting more of the Bubble Slime's soft squishy curves as she lovingly rubs against [TargetHimOrHer], the soothing pop of bubbles helping to ease [TargetHimOrHer] into a dazed, charmed state.
